# Hotel Reception Booking Screen - Project Setup

This project is a React-based hotel reception/check-in booking screen for DigiStay Hotels.

## Project Features

- Modern React UI with multi-step booking flow
- Guest information collection and validation
- Dynamic room selection with guest capacity filtering
- Booking summary with price breakdown
- Responsive design for desktop and mobile
- Beautiful gradient UI with smooth animations

## Getting Started

### Development
```bash
npm run dev
```
The app will be available at `http://localhost:5173/`

### Build for Production
```bash
npm run build
```

### Preview Production Build
```bash
npm run preview
```

## Project Structure

- `src/components/` - All React components for the booking system
  - `HotelReceptionScreen.jsx` - Main container managing the booking flow
  - `BookingForm.jsx` - Guest information form with validation
  - `RoomSelection.jsx` - Available rooms display and selection
  - `BookingSummary.jsx` - Booking review and confirmation

## Key Technologies

- React 18 for UI
- Vite for fast development and building
- CSS3 with gradients and animations
- Form validation with error handling

## Development Commands

- `npm run dev` - Start dev server with HMR
- `npm run build` - Create optimized production bundle
- `npm run preview` - Preview the production build
- `npm run lint` - Run ESLint checks

## Complete - Project Ready!

The hotel reception booking screen is fully set up and running.
Development server is active at http://localhost:5173/
